name: watchdog-osint-full-pipeline
description: Full end-to-end OSINT pipeline: watchdog ingests and triages -> translator preprocesses SK/CZ/HU/RU -> watchdog classifies -> visual-analyst handles images/video -> inquisitor fact-checks -> archivist updates graph -> impact-comms delivers debunks.

steps.name: ingest-and-triage
steps.prompt_template: Ingest latest content from all configured OSINT sources: {{input.sources}}. Sources include: RSS feeds from hlavnespravy.sk, infovojna.sk, parlamentnelisty.sk, dennikn.sk, sme.sk, aktuality.sk; YouTube RSS; Telegram webhooks; Twitter webhooks. Normalize, deduplicate, and extract claim objects. Return array of raw claim objects.

steps.name: translate-foreign-content
steps.prompt_template: Translate all non-English claims in {{raw_claims}} to English. Preserve original text alongside translation. Source languages: Slovak (sk), Czech (cs), Hungarian (hu), Russian (ru). Return claims with added fields: translated_text, source_lang.

steps.name: classify-and-route
steps.prompt_template: Classify each claim in {{translated_claims}}. For each: (1) assign escalation_score 0.0-1.0, (2) assign modality text|image|video|audio, (3) assign priority low|medium|high|critical, (4) assign route_to: inquisitor (score>=0.72 and text), visual-analyst (image/video), archive (historical). Return classified_claims array.

steps.name: visual-triage
steps.prompt_template: Analyze visual claims from {{classified_claims}} where modality is image or video. For each: extract text (OCR), assess authenticity, detect manipulation or out-of-context usage. Return visual_evidence array with visual_verdict and confidence.
steps.condition: any(c.modality in ['image', 'video'] for c in classified_claims)

steps.name: fact-check
steps.prompt_template: Fact-check all escalated claims from {{classified_claims}} where escalation_score >= 0.72 and modality == text. Visual evidence available: {{visual_evidence}}. Apply CRAAP methodology. Return verdict array.

steps.name: enrich-graph
steps.prompt_template: Update the knowledge graph with all new verdicts: {{verdicts}}. Upsert Actor, Claim, Source, NarrativeCluster nodes. Update source credibility scores. Detect new narrative clusters (spread_score > 0.80 triggers watchdog alert). Output graph_mutations JSON.

steps.name: prepare-debunks
steps.prompt_template: For all FALSE or MISLEADING verdicts in {{verdicts}} with confidence >= 0.80: draft bilingual (SK+EN) debunk posts using humanizer skill. Attach visual overlays from {{visual_evidence}} where available. Return debunk_drafts array.
steps.condition: any(v.verdict in ['FALSE', 'MISLEADING'] and v.confidence >= 0.80 for v in verdicts)
